description: Style Note This funky T-shirt from mr. men is a perfect choice for the young at heart. Pair this with form fitting denims and bright sneakers. Product Details Green round neck t-shirt, has short sleeves with brand tag on the left sleeve and graphic print on the front Material and Care Blended fabric Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
